title: Nightmare on FTM Street
relevance_summary: Phishing attack targeting Fantom Foundation wallets resulting in significant losses

prevention.rule: Block any tx that sends funds from known compromised addresses

red_flags: drain of multiple addresses across different chains
summary: A phishing attack resulted in the draining of over $7M from multiple Fantom Foundation wallets. A compromised password manager likely played a role. A guard could have detected and blocked transactions from known compromised addresses.
